info.name: Placement ERP - Complete API Collection
info.description: Complete API collection for the Placement ERP system with authentication, users, roles, permissions, students, companies, jobs, and more.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication routes — login, token refresh, logout, whoami

request.description: Uses refreshToken cookie. Rotates the refresh token and issues a new access token.
Deletes the current session and clears cookies.
Destroys all sessions for the authenticated user.
When role_id maps to STUDENT, student_id is required.

item.name: Student Eligible Jobs (Redis)
item.description: Reads student:{studentId}:jobs sorted set from Redis, then fetches full job details from PostgreSQL.

request.description: ZRANGE student:{studentId}:jobs from Redis, then fetches full details from PostgreSQL.
Tests response when student has no eligible jobs. Should return { jobs: [], count: 0 }.
